theme_archetype.archetype: Archetype 3 (Pastel & Soft) mixed with Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy)
theme_archetype.vibe: Optimistic, light, tactile, calm, trusting, maternal, approachable.
anti_patterns: No standard Vercel/Stripe stark white look
No Inter, Roboto, or Space Grotesk for headings

rules: Use 'Tinted Grey' rule: tint neutral greys with warm tones.
Ensure text contrast ratios (4.5:1 for normal text).
Use primary color ONLY for CTAs like buttons and active states.

scales.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-5xl font-semibold tracking-tight leading-tight

rules: Do not use bold for every header. Optimize for Character and Tension.
Hierarchy Gap Rule: jump between heading and subheading must not exceed 2 Tailwind steps.

grid.dashboard: Control Room Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4, tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6)
grid.marketing: Tetris Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12, wide gaps (gap-8 to gap-12)

spacing.generous: p-4, p-6, p-8, p-12, p-16. Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs.
spacing.containers: Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-6 or p-8).

surface.radius: rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl for soft, approachable feel
surface.shadows: Soft diffuse ambient shadows shadow-sm or shadow-md with 1px delicate inner stroke or border-black/5

rules: Avoid default Bootstrap columns, embrace asymmetry where applicable.

component_rules.chat_interface: Clean simple chat UI. Bubble for AI in soft pink surface, user in warm white/grey. Ample padding.
component_rules.cards: Go flat, rectangular with rounded-3xl, subtle warm borders (border-[#F4AAB9]/20). Avoid heavy card drop shadows.
component_rules.buttons: Pill-shaped (rounded-full). Primary buttons use #F4AAB9 background with #2C2A29 text for contrast or high contrast white if accessible.
component_rules.shadcn_customization: Override Vercel-look. Remove harsh borders, add rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl, replace generic grays with warm tinted greys.
component_rules.navigation: Header must have a solid or semi-solid background (bg-[#FCFAF8]/90 backdrop-blur-md). Navigation links visible on desktop.

motion_interactions.animations: Minimalist micro-interactions. Hover states lift slightly (-translate-y-1) with soft shadow increase.
motion_interactions.transitions: Use specific properties: transition: transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease. No transition: all.

icons_assets.library: lucide-react (default choice) or iconoir-react for soft, approachable lines.
icons_assets.styling: Icons should be rounded, using stroke widths of 1.5 or 2.

hero_background.description: Abstract soft flowing liquid background in pastel pink, warm white, and soft peach colors.

ai_chat_icon.description: Minimalist 3D illustration of a chat bubble with a heart inside, floating gently on a soft peach background.

health_report_icon.description: Minimalist 3D illustration of a medical clipboard and a stethoscope floating gently on a soft pink background.

mother_baby_portrait_1.description: Mother holding her sleeping newborn baby

mother_baby_portrait_2.description: Parents holding their newborn baby with love

doctor_avatar_1.description: Portrait of a smiling female doctor in a lab coat and stethoscope

doctor_avatar_2.description: Smiling doctor in lab coat with stethoscope

accessibility_rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='chat-submit-button').
Meet contrast ratios: prefer APCA over WCAG 2.
ALWAYS explicitly set text color on hover. Hover state color must be a lighter hue of ACTIVE state color.
instructions_to_main_agent: Install and set up Outfit and Figtree fonts from Google Fonts.
Override default Tailwind theme with the colors specified in this guideline.
Build the AI Chat interface as the central core feature, surrounded by soft dashboard elements for Symptom Tracking and Pattern Detection.
Apply generous padding (p-6, p-8) and soft border radii (rounded-2xl) to all cards.
Never use dark mode as requested by the user.
Use provided media URLs to populate empty states, report icons, and chat avatars.
